fields.label: Link Name
fields.description: Display name for this social media link

fields.label: Link Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: facebook-main, instagram-shop

fields.label: Platform
fields.options:
Facebook
Instagram
Twitter/X
LinkedIn
YouTube
TikTok
Pinterest
Snapchat
WhatsApp
Telegram
WeChat
Line
Reddit
Discord
Other
fields.description: Social media platform

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this social media link

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which links appear (lower = first)

fields.label: URL
fields.description: Full URL to the social media profile or page

fields.label: Profile Handle
fields.description: Username or handle (without @). Example: mycompany

fields.label: Profile/Page ID
fields.description: Platform-specific ID for API integration

fields.label: Follower Count
fields.description: Number of followers (manually updated or via API)

fields.label: Linked Product
fields.description: Product this social media link is associated with (optional)

fields.label: Linked Product Family
fields.description: Product family this social media link is associated with (optional)

fields.label: Linked Category
fields.description: Category this social media link is associated with (optional)

fields.label: Is Company Account
fields.description: Check if this is a company-wide account (not product-specific)

fields.label: UTM Source
fields.description: UTM source parameter for tracking

fields.label: UTM Medium
fields.description: UTM medium parameter for tracking

fields.label: UTM Campaign
fields.description: UTM campaign parameter for tracking

fields.label: Last Post Date
fields.description: Date of last post on this channel

fields.label: Engagement Rate (%)
fields.description: Average engagement rate on this channel

fields.label: Verification Status
fields.options:
Not Verified
Verified
Pending Verification
Verification Failed
fields.description: Account verification status

fields.label: Last Verified Date
fields.description: When the link was last verified

fields.label: Error Message
fields.description: Last error message if verification failed

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed notes about this social media link
